awards.title: Men's Wildcard
awards.subtitle: Biggest swing between workouts
awards.name: Nicholas Biagioni
awards.detail: Range: 14 percentile points between best and worst

awards.title: Men's Metronome
awards.subtitle: Most consistent across all 3 workouts
awards.name: Cade Wozniak
awards.detail: Volatility: 1.2 — nearly the same percentile every week

awards.title: Women's Wildcard

awards.title: Women's Metronome

awards.name: Nickie Pellegrini
awards.detail: Volatility: 1.1 — nearly the same percentile every week

wrapped.headline: The Silent Assassin
wrapped.tagline: Elite and consistent. No weak spots. The kind of athlete who makes it look easy.
